Petition For Order Approving Settlement Of Court Partition Action Filed Against The Estate Of Yiu Sun Ng
Off Calendar Aug-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number 291058 Guardianship of David Edward Ng.

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for William Ng. Edward Liu for Bao Ping Tan.

Mr. Liu confirmed that the terms in the addendum were the agreed upon terms in the settlement. Mr. Koplowitz concurred. The Court granted the Petition For Order Approving Settlement Of Court Partition Action and the Petition For Court Approval Of Minor's Compromise, etc., (signing the orders for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
